# ULMCode Vendor Note

- Package: `oh-my-openagent`
- Version: `3.17.12`
- Source: `npm pack oh-my-openagent@3.17.12`
- Tarball: `https://registry.npmjs.org/oh-my-openagent/-/oh-my-openagent-3.17.12.tgz`
- Unpacked for: profile audit, fork work, and offline local profile installs.

The profile `package.json` points both `oh-my-openagent` and the legacy `oh-my-opencode` alias at this vendored package directory.
